untranslatable_reason: Symmetrical triangle pattern detection requires geometric pattern recognition (identifying trend lines, support/resistance levels, apex, and breakout confirmation) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. Pattern recognition requires candlestick sequence analysis and trend line calculation beyond the scope of individual indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Signal describes a short trade on downward breakout from a symmetrical triangle. Entry condition (price breaks through lower support) approximated as price crossing below pivot point. Exit on pullback/reversal approximated as price crossing back above pivot. Stop loss set at 2.8% based on author's example (69.88 level). Target is author-silent so exit logic uses reversal condition. The core pattern detection itself is untranslatable with available indicators.
